plugin.name: NoPayNoPlay
plugin.description: Manual-validation monthly subscription tracking for Jellyfin with playback enforcement on expiry.
task.enforcement.name: NoPayNoPlay – Subscription enforcement
task.enforcement.description: Checks every user's subscription expiry, enforces playback blocking when needed and creates dashboard notifications.
notif.warningSoon.title: NoPayNoPlay: subscription expiring soon
notif.inGrace.title: NoPayNoPlay: grace period
notif.inGrace.body: {username}'s subscription has expired; grace period in progress.
notif.blocked.title: NoPayNoPlay: playback blocked
user.modal.title: My subscription
user.banner.inGrace: Subscription expired on {date} — grace period in progress.
admin.settings.title: NoPayNoPlay — Settings
admin.settings.warning: Warn user this many days before expiry
admin.settings.uiCulture: Plugin language override (empty = follow Jellyfin UI culture)
admin.users.title: Members
admin.users.confirm.reset: Reset this user back to a fresh trial?
admin.users.prompt.method: Payment method (PayPal, Lydia, Transfer, Cash, Other)?
